candidate_definition_hints.text: Edgeai TIDL Tools and Examples - This repository contains Tools and example developed for Deep learning runtime (DLRT) offering provided by TI’s edge AI solutions.

TIDL is a comprehensive software product for acceleration of Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) on TI's embedded devices. It supports heterogeneous execution of DNNs across cortex-A based MPUs, TI's latest generation C7x DSP and TI's DNN accelerator (MMA). TIDL is released as part of T…
